model_info.note: API transition graph + fixed documentation-style API descriptions + hashed semantic node embeddings + 2-layer GAT.
model_info.doc_embedding_backend: sklearn HashingVectorizer over API documentation-style descriptions; deterministic fallback for BERT documentation embeddings

api_descriptions.NtAllocateVirtualMemory: Allocates virtual memory in a process address space.
api_descriptions.NtCreateFile: Creates or opens a file, directory, device, or volume object.
api_descriptions.NtCreateKey: create or initialize an operating system object; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtCreateMutant: create or initialize an operating system object; mutex synchronization object.
api_descriptions.NtCreateSection: create or initialize an operating system object; memory section.
api_descriptions.NtCreateThreadEx: create or initialize an operating system object; operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtCreateUserProcess: create or initialize an operating system object; operate on a process; process object.
api_descriptions.NtDelayExecution: Windows API or native system call named delay execution..
api_descriptions.NtDeviceIoControlFile: operate on a file system object; file system object.
api_descriptions.NtDuplicateObject: Windows API or native system call named duplicate object..
api_descriptions.NtFreeVirtualMemory: free memory or resources; virtual memory.
api_descriptions.NtGetContextThread: retrieve metadata, configuration, or state; operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtMapViewOfSection: Maps a section object into a process address space.
api_descriptions.NtOpenDirectoryObject: open an existing operating system object; directory object.
api_descriptions.NtOpenFile: Opens an existing file, directory, device, or volume object.
api_descriptions.NtOpenKey: open an existing operating system object; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtOpenKeyEx: open an existing operating system object; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtOpenMutant: open an existing operating system object; mutex synchronization object.
api_descriptions.NtOpenProcess: open an existing operating system object; operate on a process; process object.
api_descriptions.NtOpenSection: open an existing operating system object; memory section.
api_descriptions.NtOpenThread: open an existing operating system object; operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtQueryAttributesFile: query metadata or status information; operate on a file system object; file system object.
api_descriptions.NtQueryDirectoryFile: query metadata or status information; directory object; operate on a file system object; file system object.
api_descriptions.NtQueryFullAttributesFile: query metadata or status information; operate on a file system object; file system object.
api_descriptions.NtQueryInformationFile: query metadata or status information; operate on a file system object; file system object.
api_descriptions.NtQueryKey: query metadata or status information; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtQueryValueKey: query metadata or status information; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtQueueApcThread: operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtRaiseHardError: Windows API or native system call named raise hard error..
api_descriptions.NtReadFile: Reads data from an open file handle.
api_descriptions.NtReadVirtualMemory: read data from an object; virtual memory.
api_descriptions.NtResumeThread: operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtSetContextThread: set metadata, configuration, or state; operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtSetInformationFile: Sets information for a file object.
api_descriptions.NtSetValueKey: set metadata, configuration, or state; registry key or object key.
api_descriptions.NtSuspendThread: operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtTerminateProcess: operate on a process; process object.
api_descriptions.NtTerminateThread: operate on a thread; thread object.
api_descriptions.NtUnmapViewOfSection: unmap memory, files, or sections; memory section.
api_descriptions.NtWriteFile: Writes data to an open file handle.
api_descriptions.NtWriteVirtualMemory: write data to an object; virtual memory.
